releaseNotes:
📝 Release Summary
v1.6.0 — Theme, Reminders & Logo Update

🆕 New Features:
• 🎨 Theme Selection — Choose between Light, Dark, or System (follows device) theme. Dark mode features a sleek black background with yellow accent branding across the app, including TopAppBar, navigation, and splash screen.
• ⏰ Daily Reminders — Set a custom time to receive a daily notification reminding you to log your blood pressure. Uses precise AlarmManager scheduling. Tapping the notification opens the Add Record dialog directly.

✨ Improvements:
• 🌙 Dark Splash Screen — Splash screen respects your theme choice with dark background, white text, and yellow "bossing" accent.
• 🧹 Removed Coming Soon section — All planned features are now implemented. Settings screen is cleaner with no placeholder cards.
• 🎨 Updated App Logo — Refreshed branding with the new app icon design.

🛠 Technical:
• Added DarkColorScheme to Compose theme system
• Switched XML theme parent to DayNight for system-wide dark support
• New BpReminderWorker BroadcastReceiver with auto-reschedule
• Added SCHEDULE_EXACT_ALARM permission
